title: Group Cycle
description:
South Norwood Leisure Centre

Legs, Bums and Tums

A great full body workout, targeting those challenging areas. Sculpt, tone, conditioning and build strength whilst focusing on your bums, tums and thighs. This class does exactly what is says on the tin – what more could you ask for!

Date: Fri 03 Jul 2026

Time: 11:30am - 12:30pm (60min)

Instructor: Abbie

Location: Studio 1, Studios, South Norwood Leisure Centre

Price: N/A
